title: WorkflowRunsRow
description: m7 central workflow_runs hub row. F9 zero-weight column: consumer_inputs JSONB carries per-consumer payload as a join surface, NOT internal struct sharing. CC-1 (Cascade-Cost Coupling) reads via SQL JOIN on this column. Per-row immutable on insert; updates via state-transition rows (m31 lifecycle).

id.description: UUIDv4 workflow_id — used by all downstream clusters for correlation

kind.description: Workflow kind. dispatcher_self guard refused at m32 (AP-V7-08)

consumer_inputs.description: F9 zero-weight JSONB column. Per-consumer payload joined via SQL (CC-1). Schema is intentionally loose — each consumer namespaces its own keys.

fitness_delta.description: Hebbian fitness delta to emit on CC-5 substrate-write. PassVerified=+0.25, Pass=+0.15, Blocked=-0.05, Fail=-0.10. Populated when outcome transitions to terminal state.

verification_evidence_ref.description: Pointer to m33 4-agent verifier output (file path or stcortex memory id) — required when kind=verified

parent_workflow_id.description: If proposed as variant of an observed workflow, link via this field (lineage tracking)

decay_score.description: m11 lifecycle decay (frequency × fitness × recency compound). Sunset trigger at decay_score < floor.
